entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
Hello! I’m a reverse engineer, forward engineer, and vulnerability researcher based in the greater Boston area.

This blog is intended to help me focus on documenting my work (at various levels of completion) and sharing my thoughts and findings that might interest the community.

Contact me at moc.re1yttved@tcatnoc.
entry.summary:
Hello! I’m a reverse engineer, forward engineer, and vulnerability researcher based in the greater Boston area.
